title: jasminum celebicum
intro: Jasminum celebicum, also known as the Celebes jasmine, is a flowering plant species in the family Oleaceae. It is a fragrant, evergreen vine native to Sulawesi, Indonesia, and is highly valued for its medicinal properties and aromatic oil. The plant contains flavonoids, terpenes, and other compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Jasminum celebicum, such as infusions and essential oils, can be used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and improve overall well-being.
